Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Why is that devotees in general tend to be individualist...

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-07-29 · 6 answers
with the end result of being scattered, not associating to promote our spiritual advancement and spread our philosophy in a practical way?
user [19] · 2007-07-29
because...we are westeners?
user [2] · 2007-07-29
Jehovah witnesses are westerners and they are organized... Mormons, etc, etc
user [19] · 2007-07-29
because... we have been fried to death?
user [78] · 2007-08-01
"Devotional service is fully independent. Bhaktidevi is the personification of beauty, and as such she does not require any external beautification."
(Jaiva Dharma Ch. 8)
user [19] · 2007-08-03
> Devotional service is fully independent.
I dont see how this related to the question.
user [78] · 2007-08-03
Sorry..,
:)
Wrong answer is it?
Lol :D
